title: At the supermarket
explanation:
At the supermarket

Read the notice and text.

SuperSave — Special offers this week!

Apples — £1.20 per kilo
Milk — £1.00 for two litres
Bread — 80p
Chicken — £4.50 per kilo

Tom needs milk and bread. He also buys one kilo of apples. He pays with a £10 note.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 1
exercise_sets.instructions: Read the text and choose the correct answer.

questions.feedback: Milk, bread, one kilo of apples.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Read the text and choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: The shop name is ____. | *SuperSave | Supermarket | Tom
Tom buys one kilo of ____. | *apples | milk | bread

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 3
exercise_sets.instructions: Read the text and choose the correct answer.

questions.text: Tom's shopping includes [*three|two|four] types of items.
The offers are for [*this week|next year|every day].
